title: Per-Origin Politeness, Concurrency, Retry Classification, and Adaptive Rate · Behavior Case: Per Origin Spacing
summary: A global sleep still sends bursts per host, retries permanent blocks, ignores Retry-After, synchronizes workers, and increases load after slow responses. Predict authorization, identity, scope, parsing, extraction, crawl state, resource use, privacy, accessibility, failure, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the per origin spacing increment in per-origin politeness and retry controller. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, change…
objectives: Schedule requests by effective origin with minimum start spacing, stable crawler identity, robots and owner policy, and monotonic time.
Measure discovery growth, unique-content yield, rejection ratios, queue age, and owner-defined value to stop expanding traps early.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-web-scraper-python cumulative authorized crawler and accessible site-audit portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python policy, URL, response, tree, frontier, record,
and report models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only. Sockets, DNS, public or private
sites, credentials, host files, native HTTPX, Beautiful Soup, lxml, Scrapy, Playwright browsers,
accessibility claims, legal review, load, schedules, and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class CrawlPolicy:
    owner_authorization_id: str
    allowed_origins: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_pages: int = 240
    maximum_response_bytes: int = 2_000_000
    minimum_origin_spacing_seconds: float = 1.0


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class CrawlEvidence:
    revision: str
    policy_digest: str
    frontier_digest: str
    report_digest: str
    accessibility_review_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Authorized Python crawler portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Worked focus: scraper-per-origin-spacing — Schedule requests by effective origin with minimum start spacing, stable crawler identity, robots and owner policy, and monotonic time.
# Evidence: scraper-worked-scraper-politeness-rate-retries-5
# Competency: scraper-worked-scraper-politeness-rate-retries-5.
# Case 9036: a multilingual public-service site review.
# Operating constraint: the prior valid checkpoint and report must survive failure.
# Changed case: introduce a block, private field, dangerous destination, or spreadsheet formula and stop or reject it.
def worked_scraper_politeness_rate_retries_5(origins: int = 3, minimum_spacing_ms: int = 800, maximum_origin_concurrency: int = 2, retry_budget: int = 3, policy_violations: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked5 = "worked5-5dekrow-9036"
    assert evidence_variant_worked5
    evidence_axes_worked5 = (
        "authorizationworked5",
        "url9036",
        "response5dekrow",
        "treeworked59036",
        "frontier9036worked5",
        "report5dekrow9036",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked5)) == 6
    if origins < 1 or minimum_spacing_ms < 0:
        return False, origins, "politeness-shape"
    if maximum_origin_concurrency < 1 or maximum_origin_concurrency > 4:
        return False, maximum_origin_concurrency, "origin-concurrency"
    if retry_budget < 0 or retry_budget > 5:
        return False, retry_budget, "retry-amplification"
    if policy_violations > 0:
        return False, policy_violations, "politeness-violation"
    assert maximum_origin_concurrency <= 4 and policy_violations == 0
    return True, minimum_spacing_ms, "polite-origin-controller"

content.code:
# Evidence: scraper-per-origin-spacing-19nbel
# Competency: scraper-per-origin-spacing.
# Case 8354: a keyboard and screen-reader report review.
# Operating constraint: all network and parser work must remain below explicit budgets.
# Changed case: change one base URL, fragment, query, Unicode host, or redirect and reapply scope.
def evidence_scraper_per_origin_spacing_19nbel(origins: int = 3, minimum_spacing_ms: int = 800, maximum_origin_concurrency: int = 2, retry_budget: int = 3, policy_violations: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_19nbel = "19nbel-lebn91-8354"
    assert evidence_variant_19nbel
    evidence_axes_19nbel = (
        "authorization19nbel",
        "url8354",
        "responselebn91",
        "tree19nbel8354",
        "frontier835419nbel",
        "reportlebn918354",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_19nbel)) == 6
    if origins < 1 or minimum_spacing_ms < 0:
        return False, origins, "politeness-shape"
    if maximum_origin_concurrency < 1 or maximum_origin_concurrency > 4:
        return False, maximum_origin_concurrency, "origin-concurrency"
    if retry_budget < 0 or retry_budget > 5:
        return False, retry_budget, "retry-amplification"
    if policy_violations > 0:
        return False, policy_violations, "politeness-violation"
    assert maximum_origin_concurrency <= 4 and policy_violations == 0
    return True, minimum_spacing_ms, "polite-origin-controller"

content.title: Evidence is more than syntax
content.text: The Per Origin Spacing structural check is only one gate. per-origin politeness and retry controller must also survive the stated changed case and causal explanation.
